## Acceptance Criteria
This PR is ready to merge when:
- [ ] Closes #[issue-number] with correct GitHub issue number
- [ ] All acceptance criteria from linked issue are met
- [ ] Changes tested manually and confirmed to work
- [ ] No leftover debug prints
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `master`
- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff format .` / `ruff check .`)
- [ ] Related tests pass
- [ ] No unintended side effects on existing functionality
